case_title: VIDEO SOLUTIONS VS DISCOUNT DESKS ETC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,013.64 FILED BY VIDEO SOLUTIONS AS TO DEFENDANT DISCOUNT DESKS ETC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
